title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - HomeTown - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!
